## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] End-to-end smoke test, when the API or database boundary changed

## Public-data safety

- [ ] No tokens, `.env` files, private profile exports, or database dumps are included
- [ ] New metrics document their meaning and limitations
